errors.title: Course title must be at least 3 characters.
errors.slug: Course title must generate a valid slug.
errors.description: Description must be at least 10 characters.
errors.price: Paid courses must have a price greater than 0.

auth.ownerOnlySubtitle: Only the owner instructor or an admin can edit this course.

auth.ownerOnlySubtitle: Only the owner instructor or an admin can build this course.

deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. Please confirm before deleting.

sections.title: Course sections
sections.dialogDescription: Organize lessons into sections before adding lectures.
sections.publishedHint: Published sections can appear in the student curriculum.

placeholders.title: Example: Getting started
placeholders.description: Briefly describe what this section covers.

sections.emptySubtitle: Create the first section before adding lectures and quizzes.

lectures.title: Lecture builder
lectures.subtitle: Lectures will be managed here: video, preview status, duration, and ordering.
lectures.dialogDescription: This lecture will be saved in {section}.
lectures.noSectionSubtitle: Lectures belong to sections. Add a section before creating lectures.
lectures.emptySubtitle: Create the first lecture for the selected section.
lectures.previewHint: Allow students to watch or read this lecture before enrollment.
lectures.downloadableHint: Allow students to download lecture resources.
lectures.captionHint: This lecture has captions or subtitles.
lectures.publishedHint: Published lectures can appear in the student curriculum.

placeholders.title: Example: Project setup
placeholders.description: Briefly describe what this lecture covers.
placeholders.textContent:
# Lesson title

Write the article content here.

- Use lists for steps
- Use **bold** for key terms

<u>Underline important notes</u>
placeholders.attachments: Paste one file URL per line.

editor.guideHeading: Use #, ##, ### for headings. Keep one main H1 per lecture.
editor.guideList: Use bullet or numbered lists for steps, requirements, and summaries.
editor.guideCode: Use `inline code` for terms and fenced code blocks for examples.
editor.emptyPreview: Write content to preview the lecture article.

preview.title: Lecture preview
preview.errorSubtitle: Please try again in a moment.
preview.notFoundSubtitle: This lecture is no longer available in the course studio.
preview.articleEmpty: This article lecture does not have content yet.
preview.videoEmpty: This video lecture does not have a video URL yet.
preview.fileEmpty: This file lecture does not have attachments yet.
preview.externalEmpty: This external lecture does not have a URL yet.
preview.quizEmpty: This quiz lecture does not have a quiz attached yet.
preview.quizQuestionsEmpty: This quiz does not have questions yet.

quiz.title: Quiz overview
quiz.subtitle: Review quiz lectures in this section. Detailed quiz editing happens in the lecture preview.
quiz.configDescription: Configure scoring and attempt rules for {lecture}.
quiz.dialogDescription: This quiz will be attached to {lecture}.
quiz.noSectionSubtitle: Quizzes are attached to lectures, and lectures belong to sections.
quiz.noLectureSubtitle: A quiz must be attached to an existing lecture.
quiz.noQuizLecturesTitle: No quiz lectures in this section
quiz.noQuizLecturesSubtitle: Create a lecture with content type QUIZ, then manage its quiz from the lecture preview.
quiz.emptySubtitle: Create a quiz to add assessment settings for the selected lecture.
quiz.validationTimeLimit: Time limit must be greater than 0 minutes.
quiz.validationPassingScore: Passing score must be between 0 and 100.
quiz.validationMaxAttempts: Max attempts must be greater than 0.
quiz.randomizeHint: Shuffle question order for each attempt.
quiz.correctAnswersHint: Allow students to see correct answers.
quiz.publishedHint: Published quizzes can appear in the student curriculum.
quiz.questionsHint: Use the questions panel below to build the quiz content.

questions.title: Questions
questions.subtitle: Manage options, correct answers, points, and ordering.
questions.importDescription: Paste a JSON array or upload a JSON file. The import only accepts question content for now.
questions.importGuidelineQuestionOnly: Only include question text, explanation, points, options, and correct answers.
questions.importGuidelineOptions: Each question needs at least two non-empty options.
questions.importGuidelineCorrectAnswers: Correct answers must exactly match one or more option values.
questions.importGuidelineMediaLater: Do not include image or video fields yet; media upload will be added later.
questions.importInvalidRoot: JSON must be an array or an object with a questions array.
questions.emptySubtitle: Add the first question to make this quiz usable.
questions.correctHint: Check one or more options as correct answers.
questions.selectQuizFirst: Create or select a quiz first.
questions.validationCorrect: Choose at least one correct answer.

importErrors.correctAnswers: Choose at least one correct answer.
importErrors.correctAnswerNotInOptions: Correct answer is not in options: {answers}.

placeholders.questionText: Write the question students will answer.
placeholders.explanation: Explain why the correct answer is correct.

placeholders.title: Example: Module 1 checkpoint
placeholders.description: Briefly describe what this quiz evaluates.
placeholders.instructions: Tell students how to complete this quiz.

resources.title: Course resources
resources.subtitle: Manage links, slides, code, datasets, and support material attached to this lecture.
resources.downloadableHint: Allow students to download or open these lecture resources.
resources.hint: Resources are stored as lecture attachments for now. File upload can be added later without changing the teacher workflow.
resources.emptySubtitle: Add PDFs, source code, slides, datasets, or reference links for this lecture.
resources.noSectionSubtitle: Resources belong to lectures, and lectures belong to sections.
resources.noLectureSubtitle: Choose a section that already has lectures before adding resources.
resources.loadFailedSubtitle: Please choose another lecture or try again.

checklist.readySubtitle: This course passes the publish checks and can be sent to review.
checklist.notReadySubtitle: {count} required items still need attention before review.
checklist.submittedSubtitle: This course is waiting for admin review. You cannot submit it again unless it is rejected or moved back to draft.
checklist.publishedSubtitle: This course is already published, so review submission is locked.
checklist.errorSubtitle: Please try again in a moment.
checklist.submitFailed: Could not submit this course for review.

login.title: Welcome Back!
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey

login.passwordInvalid: Password must be at least 8 characters

signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.subtitle: Start your learning journey today
signup.atLeast8: Password must be at least 8 characters
signup.firstName2characters: First name must be at least 2 characters
signup.lastName2characters: Last name must be at least 2 characters
signup.phoneInvalid: Phone number must be in the format 1234567890
signup.acceptTermsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions
signup.phoneInUse: Phone number is already in use
signup.signupFailed: Could not create your account. Please try again.
signup.signupSuccess: Account created. You are signed in now.
signup.verificationSent: Account created. Check your email for the verification code.
signup.verificationResent: A new verification code has been sent.
signup.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to
signup.verifyFailed: Verification failed. Please check the code and try again.
signup.verifySuccess: Email verified. Please sign in to continue.
signup.resendFailed: Could not resend the verification code.
